prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约26914名→32206名→38614名→39913名→54127名，整体呈持续后移趋势，尤其2025年较2024年后移约14200名，出现明显位次下滑。2025年基准位次约54127名（护理类最低），普通类专业最低约33835名，两者差距较大，反映出护理类专业拉低了整体校线；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021–2024年均为82人，2025年增至93人，2026年进一步增至103人，较2025年扩招约10.8%。扩招使竞争格局发生变化，对位次产生推后效应。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京中医药大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名近年持续上升：2021年第103名→2022年第85名→2023年第83名→2024年第83名→2025年第61名→2026年第63名，稳居全国百强，在中医药类院校中处于领军地位；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要原因系2025年该校在河北、河南等省份录取位次较2024年下滑超500名，中医学专业在黑龙江、吉林等省份出现断档，最低录取位次跌至二本线附近，对考生报考心理产生一定负面影响。抖音热度排名第103位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度不高；第五轮学科评估数据中未收录北京中医药大学条目，无法获取官方A-/A/A+学科信息，该因素。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业整体热度持续偏高，2024–2025年临床医学、口腔医学等专业均为高热推荐；中医药相关专业虽未单独列入热度分析，但医学大类整体报考意愿较强。山东省2026年高考报名总人数约72万人，较2025年约68.1万人增加约3.9万人（增幅约5.7%），考生规模扩大加剧了整体竞争。；北京中医药大学位于北京市，非山东省本地高校，无本地招生倾斜。该校在山东省招生占比约占总计划的3.5%–4%左右，属于外省招生规模适中的院校。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次54127名、2026年扩招约10.8%、山东省考生总数增加约5.7%带来的竞争加剧、以及声誉偏负面可能抑制部分报考意愿等因素。预计2026年最低录取位次约57418名，较2025年后移约3291名；位次区间56918–57918名，总宽度1000名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间56918–57918名以内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档王牌专业作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（低于56918名）可重点冲刺中医学领军人才计划、华佗班等一档专业；位次接近区间上限（高于57918名）建议以三档专业为主，兼顾二档。由于该校2026年新增中医学（岐黄班）、中医学（任应秋数智中医班）、中医学（王琦班）等特色班型，报考时可结合个人兴趣与职业规划综合考量。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for comprehensive subjects in Shandong Province were approximately 26914 → 32206 → 38614 → 39913 → 54127, showing a continuous backward trend, especially in 2025, which moved back about 14200 places compared to 2024, indicating a significant decline. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 54127 (minimum for nursing), while the minimum for regular majors is about 33835, with a large gap reflecting that nursing majors lower the overall school line; the enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Shandong Province was 82 from 2021 to 2024, increased to 93 in 2025, and further increased to 103 in 2026, an expansion of about 10.8% compared to 2025. The expansion changes the competitive landscape, pushing rankings backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has been rising in recent years: 103rd in 2021 → 85th in 2022 → 83rd in 2023 → 83rd in 2024 → 61st in 2025 → 63rd in 2026, firmly in the top 100 nationally and leading among traditional Chinese medicine institutions; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly due to the fact that in 2025, the admission rankings in provinces such as Hebei and Henan dropped by more than 500 places compared to 2024, and the Chinese medicine major experienced gaps in provinces like Heilongjiang and Jilin, with the minimum admission ranking falling near the second-tier line, negatively affecting candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 103rd, rated as average, with low exposure on short video platforms; the fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not include Beijing University of Chinese Medicine, so official A-/A/A+ discipline information cannot be obtained, which is a factor.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors overall remain highly popular, with clinical medicine and stomatology being highly recommended from 2024 to 2025; although traditional Chinese medicine-related majors are not separately listed in popularity analysis, the overall willingness to apply for medical categories is strong. The total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Shandong Province is about 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (about 5.7%) compared to about 681,000 in 2025, intensifying overall competition. Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is located in Beijing, not a local university in Shandong Province, with no local admission preference. The proportion of enrollment in Shandong Province accounts for about 3.5%–4% of the total plan, making it a moderately sized out-of-province enrollment institution.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 54127, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 10.8%, the intensified competition due to a 5.7% increase in the number of candidates in Shandong Province, and the slightly negative reputation that may suppress some application willingness. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will be about 57418, moving back about 3291 places compared to 2025; the ranking range is 56918–57918, with a total width of 1000 places.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 56918–57918, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 flagship majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Rankings significantly better than the lower limit (below 56918) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as the Chinese Medicine Leading Talent Program and Hua Tuo Class; rankings close to the upper limit (above 57918) are advised to mainly target Tier 3 majors, with consideration for Tier 2. Since the university has added new specialty classes in 2026 such as Chinese Medicine (Qihuang Class), Chinese Medicine (Ren Yingqiu Digital Intelligence Chinese Medicine Class), and Chinese Medicine (Wang Qi Class), candidates can consider personal interests and career plans when applying.
